name: cyberskill-landing-page
description: CyberSkill interactive storytelling landing page (Lumi the Golden Genie). Built per the research-foundations PRD/SRS under the CyberOS workflow.

comments.optionalDeps: three / @react-three/* / gsap / lenis power the Phase-3 enhancement layer only. They are devDependencies because the Phase-1 conversion core and Phase-2 chat must build and run without them (progressive enhancement). The canvas is dynamically imported with ssr:false, so a missing 3D dep never blocks first paint or the build of the crawlable base.
comments.noAnthropicSdk: The /api/genie proxy calls the Anthropic Messages API with plain fetch + SSE parsing to avoid an SDK version dependency and keep the server bundle small.
